overview: Siddharth Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIETK), located in Puttur, Andhra Pradesh, is a prominent autonomous engineering institution offering undergraduate and postgraduate technical education. The institute is recognized for its strong placement ecosystem, industry collaborations, and student support initiatives across engineering and management disciplines.
accreditation: NAAC 'A+' Grade (Cycle 2) with CGPA 3.26/4.0; Autonomous Institution under state regulatory framework.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Convenor Quota (Category A): Approximately ₹68,000 – ₹72,000 per year (~₹2.72 Lakhs – ₹2.88 Lakhs total). Management Quota (Category B): Higher variable fee structure depending on branch specialization.

placements.companiesVisited: Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Cognizant, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Capgemini, Mu Sigma
placements.internationalOffers: Limited publicly available data on international offers

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level entrance examinations and centralized counseling processes for undergraduate and postgraduate programs.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines generally follow APSCHE counseling schedules for AP EAPCET, ICET, and PGECET.

campus.area: Integrated engineering campus located in Puttur, Andhra Pradesh
campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess charges range between ₹60,000 – ₹70,000 annually including accommodation and dining. Facilities include internet access, hot water, and vegetarian/non-vegetarian meal options. One-time admission and caution charges may range between ₹5,000 – ₹10,000.

scholarships.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
scholarships.description: Tuition fee reimbursement for eligible local Andhra Pradesh students meeting economic criteria.

scholarships.name: AICTE Tuition Fee Waiver (TFW)
scholarships.description: Limited merit-based seats for candidates under the ?8 LPA family income threshold.

scholarships.name: Post-Metric Assistance
scholarships.description: Financial aid channels for eligible SC, ST, BC, and EBC students as per state criteria.

contact.address: Siddharth Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIETK), Puttur, Tirupati District, Andhra Pradesh, India
